Furthermore, the patient is currently prescribed "Atorvastatin," which is a lipid-lowering pharmacotherapy, supporting the active management of a lipid abnormality. Given the explicit diagnostic coding, the refined criteria prioritize this evidence over all other risk factors or inferred conditions, leading to a prediction of "Yes" for the next hospital visit.
